---
name: Documentation clarity
about: Something in the docs is confusing, wrong, or missing
title: "[docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: cntrout
---

## What's confusing

Which file, which section. Quote the specific passage if helpful.

## What you expected

What you thought the doc should say or include.

## Why it matters

What were you trying to do when you hit this? What did the confusion cost you (time, false starts, wrong assumptions)?

## Suggested fix (optional)

If you have a proposed rewrite, paste it here. I may incorporate it.
